name: PUT /api/v1/health/inspection
statusMessage: 1. Test Case ID: L3lySV  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'string'      Schema at /properties/detail/items/properties/type:          {             "type": "string",             "format": "error",             "title": "Error Message",             "description": "The type of error",             "example": "An error has occurred, the details of the error are ...",             "maxLength": 1000,             "minLength": 1,             "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"failed to parse parameter `log_level`: failed to parse \"LogLevel\": Expect a valid enumeration value. (occurred while parsing \"optional_LogLevel\")","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/inspection?log_level='  2. Test Case ID: 0Qr93o  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `PUT /api/v1/health/inspection` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/inspection
